skill.name: maxhub-weibo
skill.description: Query Weibo (Sina Weibo) data through the MaxHub API. Search posts, analyze user profiles, track trending topics, and access video feeds using AI-powered and advanced search.
skill.summary: Weibo data query assistant for posts, user profiles, trending topics, and video feeds via the MaxHub API.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: Static analysis found 676 potential issues, but the vast majority are false positives from pattern matching on markdown API documentation. The skill uses curl to query the MaxHub Weibo API with user-provided credentials. The combination of network access, credential usage, and command execution is inherent to this API client skill type and is fully documented. No evidence of malicious intent, data exfiltration, or hidden behavior was found. The skill is transparent about API key usage, data handling, and third-party dependency.

medium_findings.title: Combined network, credential, and command execution risk
medium_findings.description: The skill combines curl command execution with API key credentials and network requests to a third-party service (www.aconfig.cn). While this is the intended and documented function of this API client skill, the combination creates a risk surface: the API key is transmitted to an external service with every request, and users must trust the third-party provider to handle credentials responsibly.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Pattern combination is genuine but the context is legitimate for an API client skill. No evidence of malicious intent or unauthorized data transmission.

medium_findings.title: API key exposed in command-line instructions
medium_findings.description: The skill documentation shows users how to set the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable and use it in curl commands. This is standard API authentication but could expose the key if command output is logged or shared.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Genuine credential usage pattern. The skill does document the key as sensitive and instructs keeping it out of output.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded third-party API endpoints
low_findings.description: URLs to www.aconfig.cn are hardcoded in documentation files and SKILL.md. These are legitimate API base URLs for the MaxHub service this skill is designed to use.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All URLs point to the same domain (www.aconfig.cn) documented as the service provider. No unknown or suspicious endpoints detected.

low_findings.title: Shell command examples in markdown documentation
low_findings.description: Reference documentation files contain curl command examples inside markdown code blocks. These are API usage examples for developer reference, not executable instructions for the AI.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Commands are inside markdown reference documentation as developer examples. Not active execution instructions.

low_findings.title: High file entropy in Chinese-language documentation
low_findings.description: README_CN.md shows high entropy (6.44 bits) and api-post.md shows 6.13 bits. This is caused by the mix of Chinese UTF-8 characters with ASCII in bilingual documentation, not obfuscated or encrypted content.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Files are plain markdown with no binary or encrypted content. High entropy is a known artifact of CJK character encoding in mixed-language documents.

dangerous_patterns.title: API key used as Bearer token in command execution
dangerous_patterns.description: The skill instructs the AI to use MAXHUB_API_KEY as an Authorization Bearer header in curl commands. This is standard API authentication but means the credential is sent with every HTTP request and visible in process listings.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: Genuine credential usage pattern. The skill documents the key as sensitive and warns against exposing it in output.

content.user_title: Query Weibo data with AI search and trend analysis
content.value_statement: Social media teams struggle to gather Weibo data efficiently. This skill lets you search posts, analyze user profiles, track trending topics, and examine comments through a single API.
actual_capabilities: Fetch Weibo post details, comments, reposts, and likes
Search posts using AI-powered search and advanced filters
Retrieve user profiles, timelines, followers, and original posts
Access trending topics across entertainment, social, and life categories
Query video feeds, channels, and user video collections
Generate structured analysis reports from multi-endpoint queries
limitations: Requires a valid MaxHub API key to function
Data quality depends on the third-party API provider
Cannot perform write operations like posting or deleting content
Some endpoints may return 403 errors for restricted data

use_cases.title: Brand reputation monitoring
use_cases.description: PR teams can track brand mentions, analyze comment sentiment, and detect negative trends in real time.

use_cases.title: Trending topic analysis
use_cases.description: Media analysts can monitor hot search rankings, track topic evolution, and generate daily trend reports.

use_cases.title: KOL influence assessment
use_cases.description: Marketing teams can evaluate influencer reach, engagement rates, and audience demographics for campaign planning.

prompt_templates.title: Check trending topics
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the current hot search list on Weibo.

prompt_templates.title: Search for specific content
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Weibo for posts about [topic] from the past week.
prompt_templates.scenario: Find relevant posts on a specific topic

prompt_templates.title: Analyze user profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Get user info, recent posts, and original content for Weibo user [username].
prompt_templates.scenario: Evaluate a user social media presence

prompt_templates.title: Deep comparison analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare the hot search rankings across entertainment, social, and life categories. Identify overlapping topics and provide analysis.

output_examples.input: What are the top trending topics today?
output_examples.output:
Here are today top 10 hot search topics on Weibo:
1. Topic A - 250M热度
2. Topic B - 180M热度
3. Topic C - 120M热度

Key findings: Entertainment and social topics dominate todays rankings. The top topic has been rising for 3 hours.

output_examples.input: Get profile data for user example123
output_examples.output:
User Profile: example123
- Followers: 45,678
- Following: 321
- Posts: 1,234
- Recent activity: 15 posts this week
- Top post received 8,900 interactions

output_examples.input: Find posts about AI technology from yesterday
output_examples.output:
Search results for AI technology:
- Found 847 relevant posts
- Top post by UserA has 12,345 interactions
- Sentiment is mostly positive (72%)
- Most active time was between 2 PM and 4 PM

best_practices: Always verify the API key is configured before making requests to avoid authentication errors.
Use specific search terms and date filters for more accurate and relevant results.
Cache results for frequently accessed data like trending lists to reduce API calls and improve response speed.
anti_patterns: Do not expose the API key in generated output or share it with unauthorized third parties.
Do not call the same endpoint repeatedly in short intervals to avoid rate limiting.
Do not assume data completeness. Clearly state when results are partial or estimated.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need a MaxHub API key from www.aconfig.cn. The key is used for authentication with the Weibo data API.

faq.question: Can this skill post or delete content on Weibo?
faq.answer: No. This skill is read-only and only queries data. It cannot post, edit, or delete content.

faq.question: Is the data from this API accurate?
faq.answer: Data comes from a third-party API provider. Results are for reference only and may not reflect real-time Weibo data.

faq.question: Which languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill supports Chinese and English. It detects your language and responds accordingly.

faq.question: Why do some endpoints return 403 errors?
faq.answer: Some data requires additional permissions. The skill will skip these endpoints and note the limitation.

faq.question: Can I search for posts from a specific time range?
faq.answer: Yes. The advanced search supports custom date ranges. Use the timescope parameter in your search.
